programs.programName: PACE (Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly)

verified.notes: Search results confuse PACE (Pharmaceutical Assistance Contract for the Elderly, age 65+, income limits ~$14,500/$17,700 annual) with federal PACE (Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly, age 55+). No authoritative 2026 PA-specific data found for federal PACE income/assets/phone; official .gov pages describe prescription program only.

verified.notes: Values reflect QMB Medicare Cost-Sharing Program limits from official PA.gov source dated 2026. Program includes three tiers (QMB, SLMB, QI) with different income thresholds; values provided are for QMB tier (100% FPL). No minimum age requirement found in search results, though program targets elderly and disabled. Official phone number for application not found in provided sources.

verified.notes: Age requirement of 60+ found in official PA Department of Aging source. Phone number (717-780-6130) is for Dauphin County Area Agency on Aging; search results do not provide a single statewide application phone number—eligibility and application vary by county/provider. No income or asset limits found in search results; program appears to be need-based but not means-tested. Program remains active as of 2026.
